title: 3D Disc Overhaul
description: This pack Overhauls all the disc and jukebox in the game.
body:
This pack Overhauls all the disc and jukebox in the game.

Features to expect are:
-Working Jukebox
-Jukebox Model Overhaul
- All Disc Overhauled to be real 3D Disc's
- Vanilla was kept in mind

Thing to expect in the future:
-Updates for every Disc that comes to minecraft
- Improved Animations

Reason I made this pack:
I was sick and tired of seeing no true to vanilla packs that was a 3D disc pack, so like that saying goes if I wanted it done right I should do it myself... So I did!
